headline: P&L exposure: ₹50.38 Cr direct demand + ₹34.7 Cr contingent/indirect (β-based, speculative)
what_matters: Triggers GRI:207 (Tax), ESRS G1 (Business Conduct); regulatory deadlines for disclosure apply. Penalty may escalate if not resolved, with show-cause notice or audit risk.
P/E compression of 0.05x possible if penalty is upheld and repeated, with margin erosion of 10.1 bps and direct revenue at risk of ₹6.3 Cr (β=0.125 × ₹50.4 Cr).
A penalty of this size can widen bond spreads by 2-5 bps and trigger FII outflows if seen as systemic, though current exposure is moderate and not yet at index exclusion threshold.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹50.38 Cr direct demand + ₹34.7 Cr contingent/indirect (β-based, speculative)
Revenue at risk: ₹6.3 Cr (β=0.125 × ₹50.4 Cr, indirect revenue risk if precedent established)
